url = "/" layout = "default" title = "Venezia Porta Est" seoOptionsEnabledInSitemap = "true" seoOptionsUseUpdatedAt = "true" seoOptionsRobotIndex = "index" seoOptionsRobotFollow = "follow" seoOptionsOgCard = "summary_large_image" seoOptionsMetaTitle = "" seoOptionsMetaDescription = "" [highlightProducts] limit = 10 [highlightDestinations] limit = 10 [blogPosts homeNews] pageNumber = "{{ :page }}" postsPerPage = 3 noPostsMessage = "No posts found" sortOrder = "published_at desc" categoryPage = "magazine_category" postPage = "magazine_single" == item) == "OFFLINE\Mall\Models\Variant") { $product = $this->item->product; $destinationCategory = $product->departure()->first()->category()->first(); $departureCatId = $destinationCategory->id; $arrivalCategory = $product->arrival()->first()->category()->first(); $arrivalCatId = $arrivalCategory->id; $label = function (int|null $catId, string $side) { $type = match($catId) { 1 => 'airport', 5 => 'train_station', 6 => 'port', default => 'default', }; return \Lang::get('lnk.destinations::lang.time_label.' . $side . '.' . $type); }; $this['labelOrarioPartenza'] = $label($departureCatId, 'partenza'); $this['labelOrarioArrivo'] = $label($arrivalCatId, 'arrivo'); } } ?> ==
{% component 'tinyMCE' file="home-hero-title" class="text-white pb-3 pb-xl-5" %} {% partial 'heroSearchBar/default' %}
{% component 'tinyMCE' file="home-transfers-list" class="" %}
{% for tr in productsHighlight %}
{% partial 'transferCard/card' product=tr %}
{% endfor %}
{% component 'tinyMCE' file="home-serv-title" class="mb-4" %} {% component 'tinyMCE' file="home-serv-par" class="mb-4" %} {{ 'scopri chi siamo'|_ }}
{% component 'tinyMCE' file="home-about-us" class="text-white" %}

{% component 'homeNews' %}
{{ 'vedi tutte'|_ }}
{% endif %}

{{ 'scopri le tratte'|_ }}

{{ 'Tutte le soluzioni dedicate ad aziende,' }}

{{ 'eventi, meeting e ospiti internazionali.' }}

{{ 'scopri di più'|_ }}

{{ 'Esperienze personalizzate tra città d’arte,' }}

{{ 'colline, laguna e destinazioni esclusive.' }}

{% if dest.preview_image %} {% else %} {% endif %}

{% endfor %}
